query:
SELECT cm.isbn13, cm.title, COUNT(inv.uuid) as item_count, GROUP_CONCAT(inv.locationCode) as locations
FROM catalog_masters cm
LEFT JOIN inventory_items inv ON cm.isbn13 = inv.isbn13
WHERE inv.uuid IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cm.isbn13
HAVING item_count > 1
ORDER BY item_count DESC
LIMIT 20
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xbcpjkj7urB6FV.123b8c0ef218 --database JSmQWHzFMNuBrpEm7nuLv4 --execute SELECT cm.isbn13, cm.title, COUNT(inv.uuid) as item_count, GROUP_CONCAT(inv.locationCode) as locations
FROM catalog_masters cm
LEFT JOIN inventory_items inv ON cm.isbn13 = inv.isbn13
WHERE inv.uuid IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cm.isbn13
HAVING item_count > 1
ORDER BY item_count DESC
LIMIT 20
